fundamentals.name: Datadog, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Datadog, Inc. operates an observability and security platform for cloud applications in the United States and internationally. The company's products comprise infrastructure and application performance monitoring, log management, observability pipelines, synthetics, real user monitoring, product analytics, continuous profiler, database monitoring, data observability, LLM observability, error tracking, network monitoring, incident response, workflow automation and App builder, event management, bits AI SRE, cloud cost management, cloud security, code security, cloud SIEM, threat management, sensitive data scanner, and CI visibility. Datadog, Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue and earnings expansion, but trades at a premium valuation and has thin operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates with EPS of $0.60 vs $0.51; next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 32.2% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 113.4% indicate strong business expansion.
Forward P/E of 77.93 is significantly lower than trailing P/E of 583.71, suggesting expected earnings growth.
Gross margin of 79.9% is very healthy.
Total cash of $4.76B provides ample liquidity, and free cash flow is robust at $936.73M TTM.
Consensus is strong buy with a mean target price above the current spot price.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 583.71 and Price/Sales of 21.50 indicate a very high valuation.
Operating margin of 0.8% and Profit margin of 3.7% are thin relative to revenue growth.
Return on assets is negative at -0.2%.
Debt/Equity ratio of 32.22 is high, though current and quick ratios suggest good short-term liquidity.

news.paragraph: Datadog is benefiting from the production phase of AI, with recent articles highlighting its potential to capitalize on this trend. The company recently reported a strong quarter with its first US$1 billion in revenue and raised its 2026 outlook, prompting a price target increase to $255 from BTIG. The stock has also flashed a golden cross signal and was added to Wedbush's AI 30 list, suggesting positive momentum and analyst conviction.
